overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a wizard character exploring a snowy castle terrace at sunset. The character walks along stone pathways lined with benches and planters, circling a tower adorned with icicles while overlooking expansive snow-covered mountains and a distant village below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy castle terrace with mountain overlook

events.description: character turns left to follow the curve of the terrace wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy terrace in wizard robes, passing stone benches and planters

entered.detail: tall stone tower with circular window and pointed roof
snow-covered stone bench along the terrace wall
large stone planter containing evergreen shrub
low stone wall lining the terrace edge
expansive snow-covered mountain range in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy castle terrace at dusk, with a distinctive clock tower visible ahead. Stone benches and planters line the path, while snow-covered mountains rise in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle terrace circling round tower with icicles

events.description: character approaches and begins circling the round tower covered in icicles
character stops briefly to look up at the tower icicles before continuing

agents.ego_description: circling around the round tower while looking up at the icicles hanging from the roof

entered.detail: circular stone tower with conical roof covered in long icicles

segments.scene_description: The character circles a prominent round tower adorned with hanging icicles. The camera angle shifts to show the character looking up at the frozen formations while continuing to walk around the structure.

events.description: distant village becomes visible in the valley below the mountains
character slows and stops briefly to look at the mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace edge while admiring the expansive snow-covered mountain vista and distant village

entered.detail: small village or settlement visible in the snowy valley below

segments.scene_description: Walking along the terrace edge, the character overlooks a breathtaking vista of snow-covered mountains with a distant village nestled in the valley. The character pauses briefly to take in the view before continuing along the path.

events.description: character turns right and walks toward the columned arcade area

agents.ego_description: turning toward and walking into the columned arcade area of the castle

entered.detail: row of tall stone columns supporting the castle structure
glass and metal dome structure attached to the main building

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the mountain vista and walks toward a columned arcade area of the castle. A glass dome structure becomes visible as the character approaches the more enclosed section of the terrace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a snowy castle terrace that transitions from an open mountain vista to the enclosed architecture of the fortress. It begins with the character walking along a stone path lined with benches and planters, moving toward a distinctive clock tower under a dusk sky. As the character circles a prominent round tower, the camera shifts upward to highlight frozen icicles hanging from the structure before gliding toward the terrace edge. The scene then opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of snow-covered mountains and a distant valley village, where the character pauses briefly to take in the landscape. Finally, the camera turns away from the vista, following the character as they approach a columned arcade and a visible glass dome.
